'''thaduru''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:encephalogram|encephalogram]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-d-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:encephalogram|encephalogram]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| thaduru
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thædirith|thædirith]] || [[word:thædirij|thædirij]] || [[word:thædirish|thædirish]] || [[word:thædiri|thædiri]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thaduduruth|thaduduruth]] || [[word:thaduduruj|thaduduruj]] || [[word:thadudurush|thadudurush]] || [[word:thaduduru|thaduduru]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thaduruth|thaduruth]] || [[word:thaduruj|thaduruj]] || [[word:thadurush|thadurush]] || [[word:thaduru|thaduru]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thadufruth|thadufruth]] || [[word:thadufruj|thadufruj]] || [[word:thadufrush|thadufrush]] || [[word:thadufruf|thadufruf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:thaduruthu|thaduruthu]] || [[word:thaduruju|thaduruju]] || [[word:thadurushu|thadurushu]] || [[word:thaduruku|thaduruku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:thaduruth|thaduruth]] || [[word:thaduruj|thaduruj]] || [[word:thadurush|thadurush]] || [[word:thaduru|thaduru]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:thaduruthul|thaduruthul]] || [[word:thadurujul|thadurujul]] || [[word:thadurushul|thadurushul]] || [[word:thadurukul|thadurukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:thaduruthuthu|thaduruthuthu]] || [[word:thadurujuju|thadurujuju]] || [[word:thadurushushu|thadurushushu]] || [[word:thaduruku|thaduruku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:thaduruthun|thaduruthun]] || [[word:thadurujun|thadurujun]] || [[word:thadurushun|thadurushun]] || [[word:thadurukun|thadurukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:thaduruthuoro|thaduruthuoro]] || [[word:thadurujuoro|thadurujuoro]] || [[word:thadurushuoro|thadurushuoro]] || [[word:thadurukuoro|thadurukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|16f482d}}
